articles.title: OPENAI'S O1 MODEL LEAKED ON FRIDAY AND IT IS WILD
AI FOR STARTUPS
articles.summary: Microsoft and a16z advocate for collaboration between Big Tech and Little Tech to foster AI innovation and competition. They support open-source AI and have proposed policy ideas to support startups and equalize opportunities in the AI economy. Their joint focus is on creating a robust, competitive ecosystem that leverages AI to drive economic growth and innovation.

articles.title: META'S FORMER HARDWARE LEAD FOR ORION IS JOINING OPENAI
articles.summary: Caitlin Kalinowski is joining OpenAI to lead its robotics and consumer hardware efforts. OpenAI is reviving its robotics team to integrate AI into physical devices and collaborate on new AI hardware projects. Kalinowski's role will focus on partnerships to advance OpenAI's multimodal AI in hardware.

articles.title: MV PAINT: TEXTURE GENERATION
articles.summary: MV Paint synchronizes the problem of texture and UV generation for 3D assets. It achieves strong performance.

articles.title: OS-ATLAS: A FOUNDATION ACTION MODEL FOR GENERALIST GUI AGENTS
articles.summary: OS-ATLAS is a strong open foundation model for taking actions on a computer. Substantial effort has been put into making it work across different GUIs by collecting millions of screenshots on a variety of devices. The model outperforms essentially all other open models and many closed models at the task of GUI navigation.

articles.title: SHORT AND LONG VIDEO UNDERSTANDING
articles.summary: PPLLaVA is a new model that excels in understanding both short and long videos, addressing a key challenge in video-based AI.

articles.title: HIGH-PERFORMANCE AI NEEDS HIGH-PERFORMANCE STORAGE
articles.summary: If you're running data-intensive AI and ML workloads, you can't compromise on performance. Sycomp Storage Fueled by IBM Storage Scale [11] is a high-performance, software-defined storage system that works across clouds and on-premises. It delivers >500 GB/s read speeds, auto-tiers data to reduce costs, and is quick to deploy. Learn more

articles.title: TENCENT HUNYUAN3D-1.0: A UNIFIED FRAMEWORK FOR TEXT-TO-3D AND IMAGE-TO-3D GENERATION
articles.summary: Hunyuan3D-1.0 is a strong new generative 3D model with powerful multi-view synthesis capabilities. The output models still aren't production ready, but they are a great starting point for artists looking to generate assets.

articles.title: ANDROID LAB
articles.summary: Benchmark for autonomous agents on the Android mobile operating system.

articles.title: AI'S SOCIAL SKILLS TO HELP HUMANS
articles.summary: Constrained Human-AI Cooperation (CHAIC) is a challenge designed to assess how well AI agents can cooperate with humans facing physical limitations.

articles.title: HOW THE NEW YORK TIMES IS USING GENERATIVE AI AS A REPORTING TOOL
articles.summary: New York Times reporters used AI tools, particularly LLMs, to transcribe and analyze over 400 hours of audio for an investigation. Automated transcription significantly sped up the process, with LLMs identifying key themes and topics with improved accuracy. Human reporters were used to ensure the accurate interpretation and contextual understanding of the data, showing the importance of human-AI collaboration.

articles.title: WRITING AS A WAY OF THINKING
articles.summary: This article discusses the impact of AI on writing and thinking, questioning the notion that writing is the only form of thinking. AI, such as ChatGPT, can enhance thinking through conversation. AI tools can augment rather than eliminate various thought processes. AI will change writing by automating mundane aspects, allowing for more creative and thought-provoking content.

articles.title: WAYMO EXPLORES USING GOOGLE'S GEMINI TO TRAIN ITS ROBOTAXIS
articles.summary: Waymo is leveraging Google's MLLM Gemini to develop an end-to-end multimodal model for autonomous driving called EMMA. The project aims to enhance decision-making in the company's robotaxis. EMMA will integrate sensor data for better trajectory prediction and object detection, indicating a shift towards using LLMs beyond common applications. Further research is required to refine and scale these models for autonomous driving tasks.

articles.title: HOW ANTHROPIC, PERPLEXITY, AND CURSOR CREATE WORLD-CLASS DOCUMENTATION
articles.summary: Mintlify is the modern standard for public-facing documentation: beautiful out of the box, easy to maintain, and designed to convert

articles.title: users. Preview your docs on Mintlify
MORE THAN A QUARTER OF NEW CODE AT GOOGLE IS GENERATED BY AI
articles.summary: Over a quarter of new code at Google is now generated by AI, showing the technology's critical role in the company's operations.

articles.title: META IS USING MORE THAN 100,000 NVIDIA H100 AI GPUS TO TRAIN LLAMA-4
articles.summary: Unlike closed models from other companies, Llama-4's open-source approach allows for widespread collaboration, with some commercial restrictions.

articles.title: WONDER DYNAMICS NOW LETS YOU GO STRAIGHT FROM MULTI-CAMERA VIDEO TO FULLY ANIMATED 3D SCENE
articles.summary: Wonder Dynamics launched a tool that automates converting videos into fully editable 3D scenes.
